---
title: "Methane Plumes"
subtitle: "Detecting and attributing point sources from satellite observations"
image: ../../../assets/img/projects/project-example.jpg
---

## Summary
We develop methods to detect methane enhancements and connect them to likely sources using imagery and atmospheric transport context.

## Highlights
- Detection + quality control pipeline
- Cross-sensor validation strategy
- Case studies and benchmarking

## Outputs
- Paper: *Coming soon*
- Code: *Coming soon*
- Data: *Coming soon*

## People
- [Jane Doe](../../../people/members/jane-doe/)
